  "findings": [
    "Mortar joints not tooled concave, creating a pathway for water entry and reducing weather resistance."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Rake out untooled joints to a depth of 1/2 inch and repoint with fresh mortar, tooling them to a proper concave profile before the mortar hardens."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 602 requires mortar joints to be properly tooled to compress the mortar and seal the joint against water penetration. Untooled joints are highly susceptible to water intrusion, which can lead to freeze-thaw damage and structural degradation.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 602 Specification for Masonry Structures",
    "TMS 402 Building Code Requirements for Masonry Structures"
  ]
}
